challenge.title: Vežba 37
challenge.description: Ovo je pregled svih razgovora koje ste upravo pročitali.
challenge.instructions:
Napišite sledeće reči ili rečenice na pravo mesto:

I've scheduled, I've reviewed, we've got, They've mentioned, we've solved, Have you had, They've emailed, been informed, na haven't been.

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
James: Have you seen the latest user feedback? BLANK that some elements on our homepage aren't displaying correctly on mobile devices.

Linda: Yes, BLANK the reports. It seems BLANK a UI display issue across different screen sizes.

James: Have we fixed anything like this before?

Linda: No, we haven't. But BLANK similar issues on other projects.

James: BLANK the time to identify which elements are causing the trouble?

Linda: Yes, I have. The navigation bar and the footer BLANK adapting well to smaller screens.

James: Have we received any detailed reports from users about this issue?

Linda: Yes, a few, actually. BLANK us screenshots showing how the elements overlap on their devices.

James: Alright, what's our next step? Has the development team BLANK about this?

Linda: Not yet. But BLANK a meeting for tomorrow morning. We'll go over the proposed fixes and decide on the best approach.

blanks.feedback: Ovaj izraz se koristi da pokaže da je neko uveo ili spomenuo neku stvar.
Ovaj izraz se koristi da pokaže da je osoba proverila ili pogledala neku stvar.
Ova izjava pokazuje da je stavka otkrivena ili identifikovana.
Ova izjava pokazuje da je neko uspešno rešio ili se nosio sa problemom.
Ova fraza se koristi za pitaljanje da li je neko imao vremena da nešto uradi.
Ovaj izraz pokazuje da stvar nije nastala niti se desila kao što je bilo očekivano.
Ova poruka pokazuje da je neko poslao informacije ili fajlove putem e-pošte.
Ovaj izraz pokazuje da je neko obavešten ili upoznat sa nečim.
Ovaj izraz pokazuje da je neko planirao ili organizovao nešto, poput sastanka.
